notes: #589 MERGED+LIVE (PR #591, main c873c88). Live diagnostic this session found #589's fix hasn't been proven live yet: pipeline_runs has recorded safe_silence for ~30h despite gate_funnel showing winner_selected -- traced via auth.users.raw_user_meta_data.workday_presence_suppression_trace (owner 2cbc1bab-8e0e-43b0-bf4a-9a0cd6b5d91f) to evaluateCommandCenterCandidateGate's INTERNAL_DEBUG_PATTERN (artifact-quality-gate.ts) bare-UUID clause false-positiving on raw commitment/signal ids that lib/briefing/hunt-anomalies.ts was embedding directly into evidenceLines (lines 453, 567). Filed + fixing as #606: dropped the raw ids from evidenceLines (regex itself untouched, still catches real request_id/provider_error/stack-trace leaks); also threading the already-computed suppressionTrace into pipeline_runs.raw_extras (currently discarded) so future suppressed runs are diagnosable from history, not just the single-slot overwritten user_metadata field. This is plausibly the actual reason #567's first indispensable card hasn't fired.
